signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Aggressive receivers overpower defenders and attack the football. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their success rate on aggressive catches against single coverage.
Receivers with this ability have a high success rate when creating separation on the last cut of any route.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS, outside the numbers
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 10-20 yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Defenders with this ability can apply pressure to the quarterback from a greater distance.
Defenders with this ability do not need to spend stamina on shed attempts during a run play
Defenders with this ability can reach out of engaged blocks to tackle or sack nearby ballcarriers.
Ballcarriers with this ability have more powerful stiff arm animations and have a larger timing window for landing perfect stiff arms.
Ballcarriers with this ability will frequently attempt to gain extra yards while being tackled
Players with this ability have a chance to replenish their stamina, once per play, when it is half depleted
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Defenders with this ability will dominantly win run blocks when they correctly use the Guess Play adjustment to predict a run. Incorrect guesses will result in a loss.
Defenders with this ability will repair the fatigue of all defensive linemen on any 3rd or 4th down
Ballcarriers with this ability retain more of their forward momentum during tackles while travelling at high speeds.
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
